source: https://www.utwente.nl/en/eemcs/ps/research/dataset/ (ut-data-complex.rar). Original raw CSV: wrist-worn Samsung Galaxy S2 (smartwatch emulation), 50 Hz, tri-axial accelerometer in m/s^2 (gravity present, |acc|~9.8) + gyroscope in rad/s. 10 participants x 13 activities. Per-subject sessions recovered by splitting each contiguous 30-min activity block into 10 equal 3-min participant chunks.
